properties.name: (DORA_01.02.0020) - Name of the financial entity
properties.formula: [Name]

properties.name: (DORA_01.02.0080) - Date of integration into the group
(DORA_01.02.0090) - Date of deletion from the group
(DORA_01.02.0090) - Date of deletion - BLANK DATE
properties.formula: IF([(DORA_01.02.0090) - Date of deletion in the Register of information]="","9999-12-31",[(DORA_01.02.0090) - Date of deletion in the Register of information])

properties.name: (DORA_01.03.0020) - LEI of head office of branch
properties.formula: [(DORA_01.02.0010) - LEI of the entity]

properties.name: VALIDATOR - DORA
properties.formula:
IF([(DORA_01.02.0010) - LEI of the entity]="","❌ 01.02.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([Branch?]="Yes" AND [(DORA_01.03.0010) - Identification code of the branch]="","❌ 01.03.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

properties.name: (DORA_06.01.0070) - Date of last assessment - BLANK DATE
properties.formula: IF([(DORA_06.01.0070) - Date of the last assessment of criticality or importance]="","9999-12-31",[(DORA_06.01.0070) - Date of the last assessment of criticality or importance])

properties.name: VALIDATOR - DORA
properties.formula:
IF([(DORA_06.01.0010) - Function Identifier]="","❌ DORA_06.01.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_06.01.0040) - LEI of the financial entity]="","❌ 06.01.0040 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

properties.name: (DORA_05.01.0010) - Identification code of third-party service provider
(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider
properties.pickListValues:
Legal Entity Identifier (LEI)
European Unified ID (EUID)
National code
Company registration number (CRN)
Value added tax identification number (VAT)
Passport Number

properties.name: (DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider - External ID
properties.formula:
CASE(
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]="", "",
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]= "Legal Entity Identifier (LEI)", "eba_qCO:qx2000",
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]= "European Unified ID (EUID)", "eba_qCO:qx2002",
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]= "National code", "eba_qCO:qx2001",
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]= "Company registration number (CRN)", "eba_qCO:qx2003",
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]= "Value added tax identification number (VAT)", "eba_qCO:qx2004",
[(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider]= "Passport Number", "eba_qCO:qx2005", "Error"

)

properties.name: (DORA_05.01.0030) - Additional identification code of the third-party
(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code
properties.pickListValues:
Legal Entity Identifier (LEI)
European Unified ID (EUID)
National code
Company registration number (CRN)
Value added tax identification number (VAT)
Passport Number

properties.name: (DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code - External ID
properties.formula:
CASE(
[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]="", "",
[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]= "Legal Entity Identifier (LEI)", "eba_qCO:qx2000",
[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]= "European Unified ID (EUID)", "eba_qCO:qx2002",
[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]= "National code", "eba_qCO:qx2001",
[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]= "Company registration number (CRN)", "eba_qCO:qx2003",
[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]= "Value added tax identification number (VAT)", "eba_qCO:qx2004",
[(DORA_05.01.0040) - Type of additional identification code of the third-party service provider]= "Passport Number", "eba_qCO:qx2005", "Error"

)

properties.name: (DORA_05.01.0050) - Legal name of the third-party service provider
properties.formula: [Vendor Name]

properties.name: (DORA_05.01.0060) - Name of the ICT third-party service provider
(DORA_05.01.0080) - Country of the ICT third-party service provider HQ
(DORA_05.01.0100) - Total annual expense or estimated cost
(DORA_05.01.0110) - Ultimate parent ID - Agg
properties.aggregateSource: (DORA_05.01.0010) - Identification code of third-party service provider

properties.name: (DORA_05.01.0120) - Type of code of ultimate parent
properties.pickListValues:
Legal Entity Identifier (LEI)
European Unified ID (EUID)
National code
Company registration number (CRN)
Value added tax identification number (VAT)
Passport Number

properties.name: (DORA_05.01.0120) - Type of code (Agg from parent)
properties.aggregateSource: (DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider

properties.name: (DORA_05.01.0120) - Type of code (Agg from parent) - External ID
properties.aggregateSource: (DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider

properties.name: (DORA_05.01.0120) - Type of code - External ID
properties.formula: [(DORA_05.01.0120) - Type of code to identify the ICT third-party service provider's ultimate parent undertaking - Agg]

properties.name: VALIDATOR - DORA
properties.formula: IF([(DORA_05.01.0010) - Identification code of third-party service provider]="","❌ 05.01.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

properties.name: (DORA_02.02.0030) - Identification code of the third-party
properties.formula: [(DORA_05.01.0010) - Identification code of third-party service provider]

properties.name: (DORA_02.02.0040) - Type of code for third-party
properties.formula: [(DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider - External ID]

properties.name: Check if the Fourth Party Exists
Existing Fourth Parties Ref Data List
(DORA_02.02.0060) - Type of ICT services - External ID
Check if the Fourth Party Exists
(DORA_07.01.0070) - Date of last audit - BLANK DATE
properties.formula: IF([(DORA_07.01.0070) - Date of the last audit on the ICT third-party service provider]="","9999-12-31",[(DORA_07.01.0070) - Date of the last audit on the ICT third-party service provider])

properties.name: VALIDATOR - DORA
properties.formula: IF([(DORA_02.02.0060) - Type of ICT services]="","❌ 02.02.0060 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

properties.name: (DORA_02.02.0060) - Type of ICT services - External ID
(DORA_02.02.0120) - Country of governing law - External ID
(DORA_02.02.0150) - Data location at rest - External ID
VALIDATOR - DORA
properties.formula:
IF([(DORA_02.02.0020) - LEI of the entity making use of the ICT service(s)]="","❌ 02.02.0020 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_02.02.0050) - Function Identifier]="","❌ 02.02.0050 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_02.02.0150) - Location of the data at rest (storage)]="","❌ 02.02.0150 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_02.02.0160) - Location of management of the data (processing)]="","❌ 02.02.0160 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

properties.name: (DORA_02.02.0010) - Contractual arrangement reference number
properties.formula: [(DORA_02.01.0010) - Contractual arrangement reference number]

properties.name: (DORA_02.02.0070) - Start date of the contractual arrangement
properties.formula: [Start of Agreement Date]

properties.name: (DORA_02.02.0080) - End date of the contractual arrangement
(DORA_02.02.0080) - End date - BLANK DATE
properties.formula: IF([Indefinite Agreement?]!="No",[End of Agreement Date],"9999-12-31")

properties.name: (DORA_02.02.0090) - Reason for the termination or ending
(DORA_02.02.0100) - Notice period for the financial entity
(DORA_02.02.0110) - Notice period for the ICT third-party
(DORA_03.02.0010) - Contractual arrangement reference number
properties.formula: [(DORA_02.01.0010) - Contractual arrangement reference number]

properties.name: (DORA_03.02.0020) - ID code of the ICT intragroup service provider
properties.aggregateSource: (DORA_05.01.0010) - Identification code of third-party service provider

properties.name: (DORA_03.02.0030) - Type of code for intragroup provider
properties.aggregateSource: (DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider

properties.name: (DORA_03.02.0030) - Type of code - External ID
properties.aggregateSource: (DORA_05.01.0020) - Type of code of the third-party service provider - External ID

properties.name: (DORA_03.03.0020) - LEI of entity providing ICT services
Legal Entities using Agreement + Branch |
properties.formula: REPLACE([Decision],";","|")

properties.name: VALIDATOR - DORA
properties.formula:
IF([DORA Linked Service(s)]="","❌ DORA Linked Service(s) is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_02.01.0010) - Contractual arrangement reference number]="","❌ 02.01.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_03.02.0010) - Contractual arrangement reference number]="","❌ 03.02.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_03.02.0020) - Identification code of ICT third-party service provider]="","❌ 03.02.0020 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

properties.name: (DORA_05.02.0020) - Type of identification code
properties.pickListValues:
Legal Entity Identifier (LEI)
European Unified ID (EUID)
National code
Company registration number (CRN)
Value added tax identification number (VAT)
Passport Number

properties.name: (DORA_05.01.0020) - FP Type of code
properties.formula:
CASE(
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]="", "",
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]= "Legal Entity Identifier (LEI)", "eba_qCO:qx2000",
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]= "European Unified ID (EUID)", "eba_qCO:qx2002",
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]= "National code", "eba_qCO:qx2001",
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]= "Company registration number (CRN)", "eba_qCO:qx2003",
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]= "Value added tax identification number (VAT)", "eba_qCO:qx2004",
[(DORA_05.02.0070) - Type of code to identify the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]= "Passport Number", "eba_qCO:qx2005", "Error"

)

properties.name: VALIDATOR - DORA
properties.formula: IF([(DORA_05.02.0060) - Identification code of the recipient of sub-contracted ICT services]="","❌ 05.02.0060 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

properties.name: VALIDATOR - DORA
properties.formula:
IF([(DORA_02.03.0010) - Contractual arrangement reference number]="","❌ 02.03.0010 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([(DORA_02.03.0020) - Contractual arrangement linked to the contractual arrangement referred in RT.02.03.0010]="","❌ 02.03.0020 is required for DORA compliance."+CRLF(),"")

properties.name: Fourth Party Disposition
properties.pickListValues:
01 - Create New Fourth Party
02 - Use Existing Fourth Party

properties.name: Please enter the standardized name of the Fourth Party
VALIDATOR - Fourth Party Review
properties.formula:
IF([Fourth Party Disposition]="", "❌ Subcontractor Disposition"+CRLF(),"")+

IF([Check if the Fourth Party Exists]="*Not Found*" AND LEFT([Fourth Party Disposition],2)="02", "❌ Select the correct Disposition."+CRLF(),"")+

IF([Check if the Fourth Party Exists]!="*Not Found*" AND LEFT([Fourth Party Disposition],2)="01", "❌ If you select an Existing Subcontractor, select the correct Disposition."+CRLF(),"")+

IF(LEFT([Fourth Party Disposition],2)="01" AND [Check if the Fourth Party relationship exists:]="" AND [Please enter the standardized name of the Fourth Party to be created:]="","❌ Please enter the standardized name of this Subcontractor."+CRLF(),"")+

IF(LEFT([Fourth Party Disposition],2)="02" AND [Check if the Fourth Party relationship exists:]!="", "❌ Select the correct Disposition."+CRLF(),"")+

IF(LEFT([Fourth Party Disposition],2)="02" AND [Selected Vendor Fourth Party Id]="","❌ Select Subcontracted Entity."+CRLF(),"")

properties.name: DORA Reference Data Helper
properties.formula: REPLACE([Vendors whom Subcontract this Fourth Party List],";"," ,")
